zh.lifeSummary: 當de Lacy於大約1167年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾艾維亞斯時，她的父親Hugh de Lacy Lord of Meath11165歲，母親Rohese de Monmouth23歲。她和William FitzAlan II 1st Lord of Owestry至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1200年之後在英國史洛普爾可倫。

zh-hans.Ewias Lacy, Herefordshire, England: 英国英格兰賀福爾艾維亞斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当de Lacy于大约1167年出生在英国英格兰賀福爾艾維亞斯时，她的父亲Hugh de Lacy Lord of Meath11165岁，母亲Rohese de Monmouth23岁。她和William FitzAlan II 1st Lord of Owestry至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1200年之后在英国史洛普爾可倫。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lacy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Lassy in Calvados, named from a Gaulish personal name Lascius (of uncertain origin and meaning) + the locative suffix -acum.

variants.name: Lasee
meanings: Probably an altered form of English or Irish   Lacy  .

variants.name: Lacey
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Lacy  .

en.lifeSummary: When de Lacy was born about 1167, in Ewias, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Hugh de Lacy Lord of Meath, was 11165 and her mother, Rohese de Monmouth, was 23. She had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with William FitzAlan II 1st Lord of Owestry. She died after 1200, in Clun, Shropshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque de Lacy est née environ 1167, à Ewias, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hugh de Lacy Lord of Meath, avait 11165 ans et sa mère, Rohese de Monmouth, avait 23 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec William FitzAlan II 1st Lord of Owestry. Elle est décédée après 1200, à Clun, Shropshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als de Lacy um 1167 in Ewias, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh de Lacy Lord of Meath 11165 und ihre Mutter Rohese de Monmouth 23. Sie hatte mit William FitzAlan II 1st Lord of Owestry mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1200 in Clun, Shropshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando de Lacy è nata il circa 1167 nel Ewias, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Hugh de Lacy Lord of Meath, aveva 11165 anni e sua madre, Rohese de Monmouth, aveva 23 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con William FitzAlan II 1st Lord of Owestry. Morì dopo il 1200, nel Clun, Shropshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: de Lacyが約1167年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアエウィアスで生まれた時，父Hugh de Lacy Lord of Meathは11165歳，母Rohese de Monmouthは23歳であった。彼女はWilliam FitzAlan II 1st Lord of Owestryとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1200年以後にイギリスシュロプシュアイアクルンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: de Lacy(이)가 대략 1167년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 위아스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh de Lacy Lord of Meath(은)는 11165세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Rohese de Monmouth(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 William FitzAlan II 1st Lord of Owestry(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1200년 이후 영국 슈럽실르 클루에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando de Lacy nasceu aproximadamente 1167, em Ewias, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hugh de Lacy Lord of Meath, tinha 11165 anos e sua mãe, Rohese de Monmouth, tinha 23 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com William FitzAlan II 1st Lord of Owestry. Ela faleceu após 1200, em Clun, Shropshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда de Lacy родилась около 1167 г. в местности ювяс, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Hugh de Lacy Lord of Meath было 11165 лет, а матери, которую звали Rohese de Monmouth, 23. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от William FitzAlan II 1st Lord of Owestry. Она умерла после 1200 г. в местности клун, шропшир, Англия.

sm.Abt 1167–after 1200: e tusa o le 1167–ina ua ma'ea le 1200

es.lifeSummary: Cuando de Lacy nació aproximadamente 1167, en Ewias, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Hugh de Lacy Lord of Meath, tenía 11165 años y su mamá, Rohese de Monmouth, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con William FitzAlan II 1st Lord of Owestry. Murió después de 1200, en Clun, Shropshire, Inglaterra.
